title: clarkia purpurea var. hirsuta
intro: Clarkia purpurea var. hirsuta, also known as hairy purpleClarkia, is a variety of flowering plant in the evening primrose family that is native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Clarkia purpurea var. hirsuta include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from skin irritations such as eczema and acne. Clarkia purpurea var. hirsuta can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve for topical use, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal properties.
